title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mastech Holdings

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mastech Holdings
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
